name: Solar Flare Cascade
description: Solar prominence and flare cascades erupting from a stellar limb. Bass drives flare intensity, mids create magnetic loop structures, treble adds coronal mass ejection particles. Mouse position shifts the stellar limb.

params.name: Flare Intensity
params.description: Overall intensity of solar flares and prominences

params.name: Loop Complexity
params.description: Number of magnetic loop structures around the limb

params.name: Particle Density
params.description: Density of coronal mass ejection particles

params.name: Corona Spread
params.description: How far the coronal glow extends from the surface
